W_requires: v_{a+1} and v_{a+2} are incident to the same internal white vertex
some internal white fan vertex is incident to at least two middle boundary vertices among v2,...,v_a
X_requires: v1, v_{a+1}, and v_{a+2} lie in the same underlying connected component, counting hourglass pairs as connections
local_model.coloring_contradiction: X forces the three boundary colors to agree; W then forces two edges incident to one white vertex to have the same color.
